g.text: The fisheye is a display-time stage on top of the base
zoom/pan placement; it does not change the render/font
where the already-rasterized texture is painted.
enables the button only for a ModelKind::Mockup whose
off the UI thread (std::thread): mockup_server_up() probes :4317,
spawns npm run dev (cwd <root>/mockups) if down and polls until it
binds, then open_in_browser opens /mockup/<slug>. Realized by
textured Mesh, clipped to canvas rect
spawn in mockups/ only if :4317 not serving
